title: Paper Notation
description: Schema for notation.json companion files — symbol and notation tables for AI parsing

notation.description: List of symbols and notation used in this paper

symbol.description: The symbol as it appears in the paper, e.g. '\psi', 'H', '\mathbb{H}'

name.description: Human-readable name for this symbol, e.g. 'quaternionic wave function'

latex.description: LaTeX representation if different from symbol

meaning.description: Full description of what this symbol represents in context

domain.description: Mathematical or physical domain, e.g. 'quaternion algebra', 'Hilbert space', 'SU(2)'

type.description: Type of mathematical object: scalar, vector, operator, set, space, map, etc.

standard_or_project_specific.description: Whether this notation is standard in the field or specific to this paper/project

first_use.description: Section or equation where this symbol is first defined or introduced

related_symbols.description: Other symbols in this file that are closely related
